title: HugoSMP Cooldown HUD
description: Displays RTP and combat cooldowns above the hotbar on HugoSMP.
body:
## Short Description
Displays RTP and combat cooldowns above the hotbar on HugoSMP (Fabric, 1.21.4–1.21.11).

## Full Description
HugoSMP Cooldown HUD shows important server cooldowns directly in your HUD, so you can always see the remaining time during combat and RTP.

## Features
- RTP cooldown with a 30-second countdown above the hotbar
- Combat indicator with seconds displayed next to the combat text
- Clean and simple in-game overlay
- Lightweight, client-side, Fabric-based
- Menu accessible with the **O key** to configure cooldowns

## Supported Versions
- Minecraft 1.21.4 to 1.21.11
- Fabric Loader

## Note
This mod is designed for HugoSMP-specific messages (RTP/Combat).

## Support / Feedback
If you encounter any problems, bugs, or have suggestions for improvements, feel free to contact me on Discord: **sunguy0819**

## Changelog
- Initial release
- RTP cooldown display (30s)
- Combat countdown display in the HUD
- Support for Minecraft 1.21.4 to 1.21.11 (Fabric)
